goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'architecture' and should be in the 'west'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of entertainment'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'friday'.
The train should 'arrive by 12:30' and should depart from 'bishops stortford'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of architecture and should be in the west
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of entertainment
Make sure you get address and phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave on friday
The train should arrive by 12:30 and should depart from bishops stortford
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
